qa_pairs.question: By default, how does Samtools utilize CPU cores?
qa_pairs.answer: Samtools typically operates on a single CPU core by default.

qa_pairs.question: What methods can be employed to enhance the processing efficiency of Samtools?
qa_pairs.answer: To improve efficiency, users can utilize multithreading or GNU parallel with Samtools.

qa_pairs.question: Which command-line option enables multithreading in Samtools?
qa_pairs.answer: Multithreading in Samtools can be enabled by providing the `-@` flag.
